note: 7-seat flagship EV. 800V charging. 92% NCAP. V2L power.

faults: N Boost mode stresses battery — check charge cycles on used

pros: N Grin Shift 650hp for 10 seconds — extraordinary
Simulated gear changes and engine sound
cons: Range drops significantly in N modes — real ~250km hard driving

note: World's first true performance electric. N Grin Shift: 650hp for 10 seconds.
summary: Good reliability. EGMP proven. N modes stress battery more.
buyingTip: Battery health check essential on used. Best performance EV you can buy.
